title: Villager Pagoda House
description: Adds a Villager Pagoda House to the cherry grove biome
body:
**This mod adds a Adds a Villager Pagoda House to the cherry grove biome**

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f630dd4536d6f9f4e58134952050b7d11a5a5e12.jpeg)

Villagers of various professions live and trade inside this new Pagoda.
The interior is fully decorated, and you may even find some loot inside.
![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1bf1f1f58cad7d81c5cd6958b96dfe203229fb7.jpeg)
The Villager Pagoda can only spawn in cherry grove.
![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30ef5ac56f7a08bca8a269fbe324cec1348f4126.jpeg)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
